betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Particle Capsules§f contain exotic particles for advanced research and processing.

§eTypes:§f
• §bHiggs Boson Capsules§f - For Exposure Chamber transmutation (U-238 → Schrabidium)
• §bSparkticle Capsules§f - For Dineutronium production
• Various other particle types from Particle Accelerator

§eObtaining:§f
• §bParticle Accelerator§f operations
• Some from §bCyclotron§f

§eUses:§f
• Material transmutation in Exposure Chamber
• Advanced end-game recipes
• High-energy physics

§aTip:§f Automate capsule collection from your Particle Accelerator.
